name: Slagy
description: Slagy is one of a small set of SMGs that always roll a Maliwan barrel and a locked element. The Maliwan barrel boosts status chance and gives a minor accuracy lift. Its slag damage-over-time is weaker than other variants in this family, so it works best for applying slag quickly to one or more targets, then swapping to a harder-hitting gun to capitalise on the damage bonus.
notes: Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source. Only appears at green rarity or above. Related Bandit-made variants in the same fixed-element set include Barfy (corrosive), Burny (incendiary), and Shoky (shock).
